rationale.R1.1: The conceptual reconstruction is partially supported, but the method description and claimed contribution are inconsistent.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is weak because it asserts novelty without specific contrast or prior work comparison.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is flagged for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the value-based vs policy-gradient distinction).

rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are low because the sources of the method description and claimed contribution are unclear.
